source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/04_제품별 인허가 진행 문서/01_HAD1717MC(MG)/▶ CE MDD/■ 3. 3차 CE TCF 보안사항 제출 (12월10일)/01. User Manual/A-QI-5-002_User Manual V0.3_ENG_2020.12.10.pdf

sourceSummary.oneLine: Installation, user, and service manual for HAD1717MC and HAD1717MG wired digital flat panel X-ray detectors.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Provides manufacturer instructions for safety, installation, calibration, use, maintenance, disposal, warranty, and service setup of the detectors.
keyPoints: HAD1717MC and HAD1717MG are wired digital flat panel detectors for general radiographic systems and are not to be used for mammography.
The detector is marked with CE 0068 and includes an authorized representative in the European Community.
The device is specified as Class I medical electrical equipment in compliance with IEC 60601-1.
Calibration is recommended at regular intervals, typically once every six months.
The product lifetime is stated as 5 years from sales date and warranty as 3 years from sales date.

entities.name: JaviTech e.K
entities.evidence: European Authorized Representative (EC REP) – JaviTech e.K (Germany)

entities.name: European Community
entities.evidence: Authorized representative in the European Community

concepts.name: Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector
concepts.evidence: Product Name Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector

concepts.name: General radiographic system intended use
concepts.evidence: HAD1717MC and HAD1717MG are indicated for digital imaging solution designed for general radiographic system for human anatomy.

concepts.name: Not for mammography
concepts.evidence: Not to be used for mammography.

concepts.name: IEC 60601-1 Safety Class I
concepts.evidence: In compliance with IEC 60601-1, this medical equipment complies with the requirements for Safety class I

concepts.name: WEEE disposal
concepts.evidence: WEEE : Waste Electrical and Electronic Equipment

concepts.name: Detector calibration interval
concepts.evidence: Calibration should be performed at regular intervals, typically once every six(6) months

evidence.claim: The document is an Installation & User manual for HAD1717MC and HAD1717MG.
The document identifier is A-QI-5-002, Version 0.3, dated 2020. 12. 10.
The manual language is English and Korean.
HAD1717MC and HAD1717MG are wired digital flat panel detectors.
evidence.evidenceText: The HAD1717MC and HAD1717MG are wired digital flat panel detectors

evidence.claim: The detectors are intended for general radiographic systems for human anatomy.
evidence.evidenceText: indicated for digital imaging solution designed for general radiographic system for human anatomy

evidence.claim: The detectors are intended to replace film or screen based radiographic systems in general purpose diagnostic procedures.
evidence.evidenceText: intended to replace film or screen based radiographic systems in all general purpose diagnostic procedures

evidence.claim: The detectors are not to be used for mammography.
evidence.evidenceText: Not to be used for mammography.

evidence.claim: HAD1717MC uses a CsI scintillator and HAD1717MG uses Gd2O2S:Tb.
The detector has total pixel number 3072 x 3072 and pixel pitch 140um.
evidence.evidenceText: Total Pixel Number 3072 x 3072 pixels ... Pixel pitch 140um

evidence.claim: The detector supports Line Manual Trigger and Auto Trigger modes.
evidence.evidenceText: Trigger Mode Line(Manual) Trigger Auto Trigger (Auto Exposure Detection)

evidence.claim: The device is Class I medical electrical equipment in compliance with IEC 60601-1.
evidence.evidenceText: In compliance with IEC 60601-1, this medical equipment complies with the requirements for Safety class I

evidence.claim: The manual identifies CE 0068 certification marking.
The document names JaviTech e.K in Germany as the European Authorized Representative.
evidence.evidenceText: European Authorized Representative (EC REP) – JaviTech e.K (Germany)

evidence.claim: The document names H&abyz in Korea as head quarters.
Calibration should be performed at least typically once every six months or when the central beam has moved relative to the detector.
evidence.evidenceText: Calibration should be performed at regular intervals, typically once every six(6) months, or whenever the central beam of the X-ray source has been moved relative to the detector.

evidence.claim: Auto Trigger Mode requires X-ray exposure time longer than 30 msec.
evidence.evidenceText: In Auto Trigger Mode, X-ray Exposure time must be longer than 30msec.

evidence.claim: Product lifetime is 5 years from sales date and warranty is 3 years from sales date.
evidence.evidenceText: Life Time 5 years from sales date Warranty 3 years from sales date

evidence.claim: The product disposal instructions require following local governing ordinances and recycling plans.
evidence.evidenceText: Follow local governing ordinances and recycling plans regarding the disposal or recycling of device components.

reviewFlags.reason: Authority is ambiguous: the text includes CE 0068 and European Authorized Representative information, but does not name the notified body or explicitly state MDD certification status.
Source path references CE MDD, but the provided source text does not explicitly mention MDD.
